projects.name: Kairo-Phantom
projects.summary: A local-first desktop-agent project with human confirmation and signed, hash-chained action records inspectable by a separately runnable verifier.
projects.boundary: Published results describe declared repository test surfaces; third-party validation remains pending.
projects.interaction: Confirm a harmless local action, generate a fixture receipt, then alter one byte and observe verification fail.

projects.name: Project X-Ray India
projects.summary: Source-linked public-infrastructure records organized for human investigation and explicit review.
projects.boundary: It supports investigation; it does not determine corruption, and a source is not automatic proof.
projects.interaction: Remove a source or review gate and watch the dependent statement lose publishable support.

projects.name: Proving Grounds
projects.summary: Behavioral claims compared across revisions with adversarial tests and replayable evidence capsules.
projects.boundary: Bounded executable evidence, not formal proof and not a replacement for human review.
projects.interaction: Choose a weak or behavioral test and see whether the claimed revision difference is actually detected.
